title: Supercomputing and quantum computing in cybersecurity
summary: INCIBE-CERT article on supercomputing and quantum computing in cybersecurity, addressing the need to adopt post-quantum cryptography to protect systems against the quantum threat.

title: NCC-ES INCIBE dossier: European public administrations and the post-quantum transition
summary: Dossier from Spain's National Coordination Centre (NCC-ES) at INCIBE describing the roadmap for European public administrations to transition to Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC). Subject matter is the EU-level transition, presented through the Spanish coordination centre.

title: Vulnerability in liboqs (CVE-2025-48946)
summary: INCIBE-CERT early-warning advisory on a vulnerability (CVE-2025-48946) in liboqs, an open-source C library implementing post-quantum cryptographic algorithms.

title: INCIBE inaugurates the 9th edition of the Spanish Cybersecurity Research Conference
summary: INCIBE press release on the national cybersecurity research conference, noting post-quantum cryptography among the accepted research topics.

title: Post-quantum cryptography: how to protect our information in the quantum era
summary: Spanish government foresight portal (futuros.gob.es) trend analysis explaining post-quantum cryptography (PQC) as new security methods designed to protect information against quantum-capable adversaries.

title: The path towards quantum supremacy
summary: Banco de España Occasional Paper examining quantum computing risks to data security, studying post-quantum and quantum cryptography as solutions to the store-now-decrypt-later (SNDL) threat. Central bank publication; bde.es is not on the trusted-domains list, flagged for review.

title: Financial stability implications of post-quantum cryptography (FSR Box 5.3)
summary: Banco de España Financial Stability Report box noting that a future transition to post-quantum cryptography would entail substantial technical and organisational effort and requires advance planning. Central bank publication not on the trusted-domains list, flagged for review.

title: Parliamentary bulletin on post-quantum cryptography (BOCG, Cortes Generales, no. 223)
summary: Official bulletin of the Spanish Cortes Generales (BOCG, serie A, no. 223) stating that the transition to post-quantum cryptography must start from a complete inventory of cryptographic systems, protocols and algorithms. Parliamentary source; URL is a portal language-redirect link, flagged for review.

title: Cybersecurity report (Congreso de los Diputados)
summary: Spanish Congress cybersecurity document discussing post-quantum and quantum cryptography, i.e. the development of algorithms to encrypt information against quantum attacks. Parliamentary source not on the trusted-domains list, flagged for review.

title: Parliamentary written response citing post-quantum cryptography research
summary: Spanish Congress written reply referencing recent work including post-quantum biometric authentication research. Institutional parliamentary record; PQC reference is a citation of research rather than a policy document, flagged for review.

title: CCN-STIC 221 - Guía de mecanismos criptográficos autorizados por el CCN (noviembre 2025)
summary: Centro Criptológico Nacional security guide (November 2025 edition) enumerating the cryptographic mechanisms authorised by the CCN, including a dedicated post-quantum cryptography chapter covering lattice-based schemes such as ML-KEM and FrodoKEM. National cryptologic authority on the trusted-domains list.

title: Nueva guía CCN-STIC 221 sobre mecanismos criptográficos autorizados por el CCN (noticia/novedades)
summary: CCN-CERT news item announcing the new CCN-STIC 221 guide on authorised cryptographic mechanisms, explicitly noting its post-quantum cryptography (criptografía postcuántica) content. Official national cryptologic authority announcement.

title: CCN-TEC 009 - Recomendaciones para una transición postcuántica segura
summary: Centro Criptológico Nacional (CCN-PYTEC) technical bulletin setting out recommendations for a safe transition to post-quantum cryptography, advising early adoption of hybrid solutions (e.g. for TLS and IKEv2) and covering hybridisation modes, KEMs and hash-based signatures. National cryptologic authority on the trusted-domains list.

title: Recomendaciones para una transición postcuántica segura de CCN-PYTEC (noticia/novedades)
summary: CCN-CERT novedades page announcing the CCN-PYTEC recommendations for a secure post-quantum transition (CCN-TEC 009), explaining the need to migrate towards quantum-resistant cryptographic systems. Official national cryptologic authority announcement.

title: Boletín Oficial de las Cortes Generales BOCG-15-CG-A-223 (texto íntegro PDF)
summary: Canonical PDF of the Cortes Generales parliamentary bulletin (BOCG, serie A, no. 223) addressing the transition to post-quantum cryptography, including the need for a complete inventory of cryptographic systems, protocols and algorithms. This is the direct document for the bulletin the corpus currently references only via a portal language-redirect link.

title: El Gobierno lanza la primera Estrategia de Tecnologías Cuánticas de España, con una inversión de 800 millones de euros
issuingOrg: Gobierno de España (La Moncloa / Min. Transformación Digital)
summary: Government press release (24 April 2025) launching Spain's first National Quantum Technologies Strategy, with a priority on privacy and confidentiality in the post-quantum world (privacidad postcuántica). Flagged for review: the post-quantum reference is framed as privacy rather than an explicit migration-to-quantum-resistant-cryptography mandate, and lamoncloa.gob.es is not on the trusted-domains list.
